arts.ttl: Brentford vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: The venue for the first Premier League match of 2025 is the Gtech Community Stadium as Brentford host London rivals Arsenal. Last time out, the Bees collected a rare point on the road with a 0-0 draw at Brighton. arts.ttl: Sources claim Arsenal & Man United are ready to compete for transfer of €10m prospect
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are both interested in a potential transfer swoop for Royal Antwerp’s talented young goalkeeper Senne Lammens. The 22-year-old looks a hugely promising prospect, and CaughtOffside understands that he’s been closely monitored by both Arsenal and Man Utd in recent times. arts.ttl: Arsenal's 2025 predicted as Gunners eye Isak transfer and FA Cup win
arts.sum: Every year under Mikel Arteta has seen Arsenal take a step forward with more goals, more points, an ever-improving defensive solidity and getting closer to the league title. I fancy Arsenal to beat Newcastle over two legs in the Carabao Cup semi-finals, so it's just whether the Gunners can beat most probably Liverpool in the final.
